race.comment: ESCARPA (2) resumes. She's a very consistent mare who goes well fresh with 2 wins from 3 starts, last seen running third in a stronger race at Caulfield Heath behind Xarpo. She's trialled well for this and will take holding out. MYSTIC REIGN (3) resumes. She couldn't manage a win last time in but took on some handy races and wasn't far away. She's better than that and is well suited at the 1000m up on speed. SALUTED (4) just found one better here last time out and has race fitness on her side. She'll land in a good spot and take catching. SMART LITTLE MISS (6) resumes off a jumpout win and typically goes well fresh, she can out-run her odds. MISS COTOLETTA (8) is also in the mix on best form having been well backed her past couple.
